answers: Single parenting tips: build a support network, establish routines, take care of yourself too, and don't guilt-trip yourself.
Challenges: financial strain, time management, loneliness, and doing everything alone. But you're stronger than you think.
Support: join single parent groups, ask for help when needed, and use community resources available.
Single parents are heroes — it's okay to not be perfect. Prioritize what matters most and let go of the rest.
